betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Particle Accelerator§f accelerates particles to near-light speeds for high-energy physics research and material production.

§eCapabilities:§f
• Produces §bexotic particles§f (Higgs Boson, W-Boson, Z-Boson)
• Creates §bAntimatter§f
• Enables §bnuclear transmutation§f
• Generates §bionized particles§f

§eOperation:§f
• Requires massive power input
• Accelerates particles through electromagnetic fields
• Collisions produce rare particles and materials

§eKey Products:§f
• §bHiggs Boson Capsules§f - for Exposure Chamber transmutation
• §bAntimatter§f - for high-energy fuels and explosives
• §bIonized Particles§f - for various research recipes

§c§4HIGH POWER CONSUMPTION:§f The accelerator draws enormous amounts of energy. Dedicate substantial power infrastructure.

§aTips:§f
• Combine with §bExposure Chamber§f for Schrabidium production
• Automate particle capsule collection
• Essential for end-game progression
• Consider multiple units for bulk production
